name: core_cli_driver
description: Allows the agent to act as a user of the local SCMessenger Core CLI. Can start the node, send JSON-RPC WebSocket payloads to test messaging, and dump system logs if a crash occurs.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the SCMessenger CLI daemon in the background and pipe output to .claude/core_daemon.log

commands.name: rpc
commands.description: Send a JSON-RPC payload to ws://127.0.0.1:9002 and print the response

commands.name: dump_logs
commands.description: Retrieve the last 100 lines of the daemon log (OS-aware: PowerShell on Windows, tail on Mac/Linux)

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Terminate the SCMessenger CLI daemon (OS-aware: Stop-Process on Windows, pkill on Mac/Linux)
